'''Ket''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="AIR" /> located in the [[Ket system/Legends|Ket system]], a part of the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]] in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. It was situated on the [[Lorell Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], which linked it to the [[Daruvvia system/Legends|Daruvvia]] and [[Lovola system/Legends|Lovola systems]].<ref name="TEA" /> Its surface featured the [[Great Dalvechan Deserts]], which were [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to various succulent [[Plant/Legends|plants]] such as the [[stillar cactus]] and where harsh [[Sandstorm/Legends|sandstorms]] could occur. The [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Mammal/Legends|mammalian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known as the [[Ketton/Legends|Ketton]] also hailed from that region.<ref name="AIR" /> At some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="2 ABY">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the Ketton [[Derrida/Legends|Derrida]] had traveled offworld.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ket was first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Ket [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square O-9.<ref name="TEA" />
